# Password Ai MCP

> Password manager MCP — generate, strength-check, breach monitoring, entropy calculation

`password-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install password-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx password-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `generate_password` — Generate secure random passwords.
- `check_strength` — Analyze password strength with detailed scoring.
- `hash_password` — Hash a password. Algorithms: md5, sha1, sha256, sha512, sha3_256.
- `estimate_crack_time` — Estimate how long to brute-force a password at given guess rate.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/password-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/password-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
